title: Make Wolves Howl
description: Makes wolves howl with a 50/50 chance every full moon.
body:
Ever felt like Minecraft nights were a little too quiet? This datapack adds a small but spooky touch—wolves will sometimes howl during a full moon!

How it Works:

On full moon nights, there’s a 50% chance that a random nearby wolf will howl.

How to Install:

Drop the .zip file into your world’s datapacks folder.

That’s it—next full moon, listen for the howls!
